title: AES-CCM encrypt cleanup references decrypt-only ct_len
description: lichen_aes_ccm_encrypt() cleanup tests ct_len and wipes plaintext using ct_len, but ct_len is not in scope in the encrypt function and plaintext is a const pointer. Trigger: compile lichen/subsys/lichen/oscore/aes_ccm.c. Bad behavior: the AES-CCM wrapper does not compile, so OSCORE and link MIC code cannot link. Location: lichen/subsys/lichen/oscore/aes_ccm.c:74-81.
close_reason: Fixed encrypt cleanup to avoid decrypt-only ct_len and const plaintext wipe; verified aes_ccm.c syntax.
